See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/eiei114/pi-qmd-adaptive-search/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for project goals, design constraints, and how we review changes.

## Problem

What pain are you hitting today? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want. If it touches search ranking, learning, or privacy, call that out.

## Alternatives considered

## Additional context

Examples, mock output, or links to related issues are welcome.
